query: Convert this video generation pipeline from text-to-video to image-to-video: take a single input image as the first frame, encode it through the Wan2.2 pipeline, and drive the rest of the motion from a text prompt, while keeping the Chroma LUT grading and film grain post-processing chain fully intact.

desired.outcome: The workflow now accepts an image input, uses it as the conditioning for frame 1, and generates subsequent frames from a text prompt, with the original LUT and film grain effects applied to the final output.
desired.quality: Image-to-video data flow is correctly wired: image loaded, encoded, fed into the appropriate latent stream, no broken connections or missing nodes; the original dual CLIP/UNET/VAE pipelines are preserved; the color grading and film grain stages remain unchanged and functional.

_tags.author_rationale: Requires genuinely restructuring the pipeline's conditioning source and latent path while preserving a complex post-processing chain, testing the agent's ability to reason about video generation pipelines holistically.
